dimensions.notes: Mesh Z min is -3.0 (corner feet). Mesh Z max is 162.75 vs echoed/spec 163 — 0.25 mm under, within defaultTolerance 1.0. Tuft peak lands here; the 0.25 mm deficit is because tuft bases sit on the panel arc (z ≈ 141.76 at X=±17.5) rather than at panel-center-top (z=145), so the visible peak-above-arc is ~21 mm not 18 mm. Acceptable within spec tolerance.

Clean rectangular exterior envelope; owl face geometry deleted per Fix 1. Scoop lip restored on upper 14 mm of front wall (45° from horizontal); lower 7 mm vertical. Integrated concave finger-grip (30 mm wide × 2.5 mm deep) carved into scoop face center. No separate grip scallop. Bbox Z max matches ext_h exactly.

fixesApplied.title: Ear tufts — invert proportion, tilt outward, 3D sweep, base blend
Back panel silhouette — rounded top, soft vertical edges, convex +Y face
Back panel facial disc + eyes + beak
Remove feather embosses from printer-section walls
Tray scoop lip + integrated finger-grip (restoration + evolution)
Base plate corner r=6→8, foot-to-plate r=1.5 blend

dimensionDeviations.reason: With foot_inset=5 mm and foot_d=8 mm, a 1.5 mm upper blend fillet would make the flare top-diameter 11 mm (radius 5.5 mm) — poking 0.5 mm past the base plate edge. Reduced to 1.0 mm so the flare top-diameter is exactly 10 mm (radius 5 mm) and stays flush with the plate edge.

The back panel's cross-section is only 3–5 mm thick in Y. A full 4 mm offset-offset vertical-edge fillet collapses the section below printable minimum. Reduced to 1.2 mm — visible softening is subtle but the panel mass is preserved. The full r=4 vertical-edge softening IS applied to the cradle body walls (z=0–25 mm) via wall_footprint() so the read from the lower body is unchanged.

Brief's 18 mm peak-height-above-panel-top assumed panel-center-top (z=145) but the tuft base sits on the top arc at z≈141.76. To make actual tuft tip reach spec z=163 (cradle_total_h_with_tufts), the internal tuft_peak_dz is 20 mm (from base center). Visible silhouette height above local arc top is ~21 mm (≈20+blend−dip). Width 35 > height 21 preserves 'wider than tall' intent from brief.

specChangesApplied: Removed all tray_owl_* params (eye/pupil/beak on tray) per Fix 1
Updated ear_tuft_* params: base_width 25→35, peak_height_above 35→18, peak_z_from_base 180→163
Added ear_tuft_tilt_outward_deg:25, ear_tuft_forward_sweep_mm:8, ear_tuft_base_blend_r:5, ear_tuft_base_y_depth:7, ear_tuft_tip_y_depth:3.5
Added back_panel_facial_disc_* block (w:70, h:54, center_z:90, depth:1.5, rim_r:2)
Added back_panel_eye_* block (w:9, h:11, center_z:95, center_x_offset:16, proud:2)
Added back_panel_beak_* block (3D wedge, base/apex dims and proud)
views list updated to user-frame hero_views
description rewritten to reflect motif consolidation and new feature set

features.name: corner_feet
features.description: Four flat cylinder feet (d=8 mm, h=3 mm) on the base underside, plus a 1.0 mm upper blend flare (truncated cone) that softens the foot-to-plate junction at z=0. Foot bottom is a clean flat disc for bed adhesion. Flare radius at the top is capped at foot_inset (5 mm) so it stays inside the plate footprint.

features.name: base_plate
features.description: Stepped base plate: 86 mm wide at printer section, widening via concave fillet (r=8) transition at Y=152..160 to 108 mm shelf. Four outer corners filleted r=8 (round 2 increase from r=6). Thickness 4 mm.

features.name: low_perimeter_walls
features.description: Stepped 25 mm low bathtub wall. Printer section: 3 mm side/back/front walls around 80×154 mm pocket. Shelf section: 2.05 mm side walls flanking open-top / open-front tray slot. Top edge 1.5 mm fillet via stacked quarter-round slices. Exterior vertical edges r=4 via wall_footprint offset.

features.name: cable_slot
features.description: 25 × 20 mm U-notch in the -Y back wall (user-back face). Bottom at z=0, top at z=20. Entirely within low_wall zone so no bridge. Seam-hidden user-back face per brief.

features.name: tray_shelf_upper_walls
features.description: Short upper cap of the tray slot walls (z=25..26.3). Covers the extra 1.3 mm of slot height above the low wall top. No top-edge fillet (walls 2.05 mm thin — fillet would reduce section below 1.2 mm min).

features.name: back_panel_body
features.description: Rounded-top sculptural panel. 86 mm wide × ~5 mm deep at center × 145 mm tall at X=0 (top-arc radius 160 mm; top-corners at z=139). Gently convex +Y face (sagitta 2 mm over 86 mm chord, R≈463 mm). Flat -Y face (against-wall). Convexity ramps up from 0 at z=25 to full 2 mm by z=29 — approximates r=4 concave base blend. Vertical X-Y edge softening via 1.2 mm offset-offset (reduced from brief's 4 mm due to panel thinness; full 4 mm fillet applied to walls below z=25). Built as 80 stacked horizontal slices for smooth top-arc + convex-front surface.

features.name: facial_disc_recess
features.description: Ovoid recess carved into the +Y face of the back panel. Width 70 mm, height 54 mm, depth 1.5 mm at center (tapering to 0 at rim via sphere-scale). Center at X=54, Z=90 (62% of panel height). Frames eyes and beak.

features.name: eyes
features.description: Two vertically elongated dome-top hemispheroids, forward-facing. Size 9 × 11 mm (W×H). Centers at X=±16 from panel center, Z=95. Protrude ~2 mm forward of the disc floor (net ~0.5 mm proud of surrounding convex +Y face). Dome-topped profile.

features.name: pupils
features.description: Two small dome-topped hemispheres (r=2.5 mm, 0.8 mm proud beyond eye surface) centered on each eye. Rendered by default; brief marks these optional — round 2 critique may decide to delete.

features.name: beak_3d_wedge
features.description: 3D downward-pointing wedge between and below the eyes. Hull of (a) a flat base slab embedded in the panel at X=54±4.5, Z=80 and (b) a small rounded apex sphere at X=54, Z=73, Y≈8.1 mm (~4 mm proud of the disc floor). Apex pokes forward-and-down for the 3D read. Apex radius r=1 mm.

features.name: ear_tufts
features.description: Two chained-hull tufts emerging from the panel's rounded top. Base: 35 mm wide × 7 mm Y-depth flat ellipse, dipped 3 mm into the panel top for visual blend (approximates r=5 base fillet). Mid: 55% X-width, pulled in from the linear base-to-tip X-tilt path to create a concave feather dip. Tip: 28% X-width × 3.5 mm Y-depth ellipse at the apex. Outward tilt 25° (X-shift by sin(25)×height at tip). Forward sweep 8 mm in +Y. Silhouette: base → concave mid → tapered tip. Print-frame supports REQUIRED (tree) per brief for the forward-sweeping portion.

features.name: printer_shelf_concave_fillet
features.description: Concave fillet (r=8, quarter-arc) in the 2D footprint at X=97..105, Y=152..160 on the right side (mirrored on left). Replaces the previous 45° chamfer. Swept vertically from z=0 through the full cradle body. Every print layer above is equal-or-larger than the layer below — fully self-supporting.

featuresTray.name: tray_shell
featuresTray.description: Rectangular bin, 103.2 × 94.2 × 21.6 mm exterior, 100 × 91 × 20 mm interior. Walls 1.6 mm, floor 1.6 mm. Open top. Four vertical exterior corners filleted r=3.

featuresTray.name: scoop_lip
featuresTray.description: Upper 14 mm of the tray's +Y (user-front) wall tilts back at 45° from horizontal, receding into the tray interior by 14 mm in -Y between z=7 and z=21.6. Lower 7 mm stays vertical as structural base. Implemented as a triangular prism cutter.

featuresTray.name: integrated_finger_grip
featuresTray.description: Concave cylindrical dip (R≈46 mm) carved into the central 30 mm of the scoop face, perpendicular to the scoop plane. 2.5 mm depth. Serves as a finger-pull for tray removal. Merged into the scoop — not a separate feature.

cradle.bed_face: base plate bottom (z=-3 flat feet contact bed)

supports_permitted_but_avoidable: scoop_lip 45° face (printable as overhang per iter 1)

userOrientationConfirmed.user_front: +Y face (tray slides in/out here; owl face visible here)
